variables.label: 🔐 PostgreSQL Password ★
variables.description: Password for the internal PostgreSQL database. Min. 8 characters. Will be auto-generated if left as default.

variables.label: 🔑 Binance API Key ★
variables.description: Your Binance API Key. Create one at binance.com → API Management. Make sure to enable Spot & Margin Trading permissions.

variables.label: 🔑 Binance API Secret ★
variables.description: Your Binance API Secret. Keep this confidential — never share it publicly.

variables.label: 🌐 Frontend Port ★
variables.description: Internal port the frontend listens on. Default: 4000. Change only if port 4000 is already in use on your server.

variables.label: 🛡️ App Password ★
variables.description: Master password for full app access (Settings, Tax, Trading controls). Use a strong password with mixed characters.

variables.label: 👁️ Viewer Password (optional)
variables.description: Password for read-only access. Users with this password cannot access Settings or Tax sections. Leave empty to disable viewer mode.

variables.label: 📬 Telegram Bot Token (optional)
variables.description: Token from @BotFather on Telegram. Required for trade notifications. Set to 0 to disable Telegram integration.

variables.label: 💬 Telegram Group ID (optional)
variables.description: ID of your Telegram group for bot notifications. Use @userinfobot to retrieve your group ID. Set to 0 to disable.

variables.label: 👤 Telegram Owner ID (optional)
variables.description: Your personal Telegram user ID for direct bot commands. Use @userinfobot to retrieve your user ID. Set to 0 to disable.

instructions.start: unCoded Trading Bot Setup — Please fill in all required fields. Fields marked with ★ are mandatory.
instructions.end: Deployment complete! Your unCoded Trading Bot is now active. Access the frontend via the assigned URL.

description: Automated trading bot with Google OAuth, Binance API integration and PostgreSQL database
